summary: A vertical screen recording of a social media Reels feed, showing the phone status bar and a Reels header at top and on-screen engagement counts and an Add a comment bar at bottom. The played video is a split-screen: on the left a bearded man in a cap and glasses speaks to camera from indoors, and on the right is footage of a dark-haired woman in a dark top, with a faint TRENDING POLITICS watermark. The post is credited to an account named My Patriot Post with a caption that begins AOC was caught on camera saying.

script.scene: Split-screen with a bearded commentator on the left and footage of a woman on the right inside a Reels interface.
The right panel fills with a close shot of the dark-haired woman speaking.

notable_text: Reels; TRENDING POLITICS; My Patriot Post; AOC was caught on camera saying
